files.patch:
@@ -38,6 +38,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Tests (coverage)
         run: pnpm test:coverage
 
+      - name: Build
+        run: pnpm build
+
       - name: Pack
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail

@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ Docs + setup: `https://summarize.sh`
 
 ## Install in Chrome (Unpacked)
 
-Step-by-step (non-technical):
+Step-by-step:
 
 1) Build the extension:
    - `pnpm -C apps/chrome-extension build`

@@ -52,8 +52,9 @@
     "lint:fix": "biome check --write . && oxlint --type-aware --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json --config .oxlintrc.json --fix .",
     "check": "pnpm lint && pnpm test:coverage",
     "test:extension-e2e": "pnpm -C apps/chrome-extension test:e2e",
-    "test": "pnpm build && vitest run",
-    "test:coverage": "pnpm build && vitest run --coverage",
+    "test": "vitest run",
+    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
+    "test:coverage:build": "pnpm build && pnpm test:coverage",
     "release": "bash scripts/release.sh"
   },
   "pnpm": {
